a:r.a:t: Simple 6-step process from query to actionable insights
Natural language input like "Simulate flood in Pune with 150mm rainfall"
OpenStreetMap renders the target city with detailed geospatial data
Heatmap overlay visualizes flood/heat risk zones in real-time
System retrieves relevant policies, guidelines, and historical data
AI generates contextual mitigation plans and action recommendations
Comprehensive, shareable report generated with one click
